name: X-Golf Glenview
about: X-Golf Glenview is a high-tech golf simulation facility offering a modern and social experience for players of all skill levels. The venue is equipped with 8 state-of-the-art golf simulators that utilize a combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors to deliver accurate and realistic gameplay. With its full bar, restaurant, and event spaces, it combines on-course practice with social and dining elements, making it suitable for casual outings, training, and group gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology for accurate gameplay
Full bar and restaurant for a complete golf and social experience
Flexible booking options for individuals and groups
Event space for corporate and private parties

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant menu with shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas available on-site
Full bar with beer by the glass or on tap, cocktails, and wines

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available on-site, but you are also welcome to use your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, as the venue offers a full restaurant and bar on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes 1 hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. For multiple players, it’s recommended to book an additional hour for each additional player to allow sufficient time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf welcomes children of all ages and is suitable for family outings.
